scripts.test: composer test --working-dir apps/server && pnpm -r --if-present test && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --dir apps/server build && pnpm --dir apps/extension build && playwright install chromium && playwright test
scripts.lint: composer exec --working-dir apps/server pint -- --test && pnpm -r --if-present lint
scripts.analyze: composer exec --working-dir apps/server phpstan -- analyse && pnpm -r --if-present analyze
